primaryUse: Product lens, AI strategy, executive communication, launch filtering, and market sensemaking.

reusePolicy.summary: Use public newsletter, video, podcast, and personal site material as product-strategy anchors only.
reusePolicy.codeReuse: No useful verified open-source code surface found.
reusePolicy.transcripts: Use public captions, podcast transcripts, or Substack pages for summary with attribution only; do not vendor full transcripts or posts.
